name: 5 Star Car Title Loans
description_short: New Orleans, LA: 5 Star Car Title Loans at 2802 S Claiborne Ave offers fast car title loans and payday advances in South Claiborne.
description_long:
5 Star Car Title Loans has a dedicated location in New Orleans, LA at 2802 S Claiborne Ave #5b, in the South Claiborne neighborhood. This standalone storefront is open Monday through Friday from 9AM to 7PM and Saturday 10AM to 5PM, making it convenient for weekday and weekend access. The location is designed to process title loans and payday advances quickly.

At this New Orleans location, customers can apply for auto title loans using their vehicle as collateral, access payday loans for immediate cash needs, and explore car pawn options. The team at 2802 S Claiborne Ave is available at +1 442-276-5110 to answer questions about loan amounts, required documentation, and approval timelines. Fast funding is the standard here.

For New Orleans residents facing unexpected expenses, this S Claiborne location provides quick access to cash without the traditional bank application process. Bring a valid ID, proof of vehicle ownership, and current auto insurance to your appointment. 5 Star Car Title Loans specializes in serving people who need rapid loan decisions and funding.
address: 2802 S Claiborne Ave #5b, New Orleans, LA 70125

company_info.headquarters: 2802 S Claiborne Ave #5b, New Orleans, LA 70125

pros: Same-day or next-day funding available for approved applicants
Loan amounts up to $50,000, significantly higher than typical payday loans
Borrowers keep vehicle keys and can continue driving while repaying
No prepayment penalties, allowing early repayment without additional fees
No hidden fees with advertised transparent terms
Operates as a licensed and regulated lender across 18 states
Accepts alternative collateral including motorcycles and commercial vehicles
Online and in-person application options available
cons: APR rates not disclosed on website, making true cost of borrowing unclear
Vehicle serves as collateral, creating risk of repossession if loan defaults
Loan terms and availability vary significantly by state and local regulations
Title loans are high-cost borrowing products typically with APRs exceeding 100%
Customer review base is small (11 reviews) and may not be fully representative
best_for: Vehicle owners facing urgent cash needs who want to keep their cars
Borrowers with damaged credit who cannot qualify for traditional bank loans
Those needing larger emergency amounts ($2,000-$50,000) faster than installment loans
Owners of alternative vehicles (motorcycles, semi-trucks) seeking collateral-based loans
diagnosis: 5 Star Car Title Loans is best for vehicle owners in urgent need of cash who have equity in their car but cannot access traditional bank loans due to credit issues or speed requirements. The primary caveat is that title loans are high-cost emergency products (typically 100%+ APR, though not disclosed here) where failure to repay risks vehicle repossession—they should only be considered after exploring lower-cost alternatives like personal loans, credit union PALs, or employer advances.
services: Vehicle title loans up to $50,000 with flexible repayment terms
Motorcycle title loans using motorcycle equity as collateral
Semi-truck and commercial vehicle title loans
Installment loans with fixed monthly payments (up to 24-month terms)
Same-day loan funding for approved applicants
Online loan applications with secure 256-bit SSL/TLS encryption
In-person applications at physical locations across 18 states
Title loans with no prepayment penalties
Title loans accessible to borrowers without perfect credit
meta_description: 5 Star Car Title Loans at 2802 S Claiborne Ave, New Orleans, LA. Fast auto title loans and payday advances with quick approval.
